title: S3 fix-first: reap phục hồi được nhánh checked-out mồ côi sau SIGKILL
action: Bug đã chẩn đoán + repro (cell 9 block reason): sau SIGKILL giữa item, nhánh fgw/<id> còn checked-out tại worktree path mồ côi; startupReap gọi createWorktree trên nhánh đó → git từ chối 'already checked out at ...' → WorktreeError không có .category → uncaught → reap tự crash exit 1. Fix hai tầng: (1) worktree.mjs — trước khi reuse nhánh, phát hiện nhánh đang checked-out ở path ngoài repo (git worktree list --porcelain): path còn tồn tại → git worktree remove --force path đó; path đã mất → git worktree prune; rồi mới add; đồng thời WorktreeError mang .category='worktree-fail' để mọi lỗi worktree còn sót phân lớp được thay vì crash thô. (2) loop.mjs startupReap — bọc mọi thao tác worktree trong reap: lỗi worktree-fail khi reap → item về blocked reason runner-crash-reclaim (degrade có kiểm soát), reap không bao giờ chết thô. Test: unit worktree reclaim orphaned-checkout (cả hai nhánh: path còn / path mất), reap không crash khi nhánh bị giữ. KHÔNG sửa test/e2e/runner-loop.test.mjs (cell 9 sở hữu, đang nằm working tree chưa commit) — fix phải làm case crash-idempotency của nó XANH nguyên trạng.

truths: npm test xanh TOÀN BỘ kể cả e2e crash-idempotency của cell 9 nguyên trạng không sửa
Reclaim orphaned checkout hoạt động cả khi path còn lẫn khi path đã mất
WorktreeError mang category worktree-fail; reap degrade về blocked thay vì crash
key_links: loop.mjs reap dùng đường reclaim mới; không đường nào trong reap ném lỗi thô
prohibitions: Không sửa test/e2e/runner-loop.test.mjs (khóa đỏ→xanh nguyên trạng)

trace.outcome: Fixed the SIGKILL crash-idempotency bug diagnosed on cell 9: worktree.mjs now reclaims a branch already checked out at an orphaned path (git worktree list --porcelain detect -> remove --force if the path still exists, prune if gone) before reusing it, and WorktreeError carries .category='worktree-fail' alongside .errorClass. loop.mjs's startupReap wraps its worktree operations so any worktree-fail during reap degrades the item to blocked/runner-crash-reclaim instead of crashing the whole reap raw. test/e2e/runner-loop.test.mjs's previously-red crash-idempotency case now passes unmodified; 234/234 tests green (229 baseline + 3 e2e + 2 new unit cases for the reclaim's two sub-cases, minus the 1 e2e case that was already counted red-then-green).
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "test/e2e/runner-loop.test.mjs (crash-idempotency case, lines 272-318)",
    "test/runner/worktree.test.mjs",
    "test/runner/loop.test.mjs"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "test/runner/worktree.test.mjs: replaced 'createWorktree throws worktree-fail when the branch is already checked out elsewhere' (encoded the bug as correct behavior) with 'createWorktree reclaims a branch already checked out at an orphaned path still on disk (crash recovery)' and '...at a path that is already gone from disk (prune)', plus two direct reclaimOrphanedCheckout unit tests (no-op, and reclaimed:true with force-remove)",
    "test/runner/loop.test.mjs: added 'startup reap reclaims an orphaned checkout left behind by a genuine crash (worktree teardown never ran) instead of dying raw' -- reproduces cell 9's bug at the unit level (branch left checked out, no removeWorktree call) and asserts a clean reap to proposed"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Fresh run before any change (node --test test/e2e/runner-loop.test.mjs): 'e2e crash-idempotency...' failed with AssertionError: second --once did not recover cleanly: fatal: 'fgw/item-crash' is already checked out at '/tmp/fgos-worktrees/item-crash-p0QnNn' / fgos-runner: git worktree add failed for branch \"fgw/item-crash\": ... -- identical to cell 9's recorded verify_output. Also: test/runner/worktree.test.mjs's old 'createWorktree throws worktree-fail when the branch is already checked out elsewhere' test passed pre-fix (asserting the bug's own symptom as the expected contract) and was replaced, not weakened, once the fix changed that symptom into a reclaim.",
  "verification_run": "npm test -> 234 passed, 0 failed (229 prior baseline behavior + the 3 e2e cases, crash-idempotency now green, + 2 new worktree unit cases + 1 new loop unit case; net +5 tests over cell 9's 230 total since 2 old worktree assertions were replaced by richer ones)",
  "deliberate_exceptions": []
}
